name: Linux Network Service Scanning - Auditd
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Alejandro Ortuno, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Linux Network Service Scanning - Auditd
SIGMA Description: Detects enumeration of local or remote network services.

False positives:
- Legitimate administration activities

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/telnet%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nmap%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/netcat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/ncat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nc.openbsd%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%network_connect_4%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Linux Network Service Scanning - Auditd on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/telnet%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nmap%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/netcat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/ncat%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/nc.openbsd%') AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%network_connect_4%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Linux Network Service Scanning - Auditd

This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
